instruction: Safari currently opens an unwanted site on launch. In Safari's general settings, change the homepage so it opens {URL} instead.
source: adapted:osworld:3299584d-8f11-4457-bf4c-ce98f7600250 mode=port; OSWorld Chrome 'always opens funbrain.com on launch — make it stop' is a generic browser-startup-page preference; maps to Safari com.apple.Safari HomePage read via Tier-A defaults

args: defaults write com.apple.Safari HomePage -string 'https://funbrain.invalid/'; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.Safari HomePage -string '{URL}'; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
